cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out between what times Anthony could have gone to the amusement park. First, let me list out all the given information. Anthony woke up at 6am. Then Leslie saw him reading at the library from 6am to 8am. After that, Jennifer saw him working out at the gym from 8am to 9am. Then Anthony saw Anthony buying cookies at a bakery from 2pm to 9pm. Then William saw Anthony buying a bike at the bike shop from 9pm to 10pm. The amusement park was closed after 10pm. So Anthony's known activities are: - 6am: wake up - 6am-8am: library (Leslie) - 8am-9am: gym (Jennifer) - 2pm-9pm: bakery (Anthony himself) - 9pm-10pm:
